title: Obsidian Armor
description: Adds the option to craft armor out of obsidian blocks. The armor is flameproof + has better stats than netherite.
body:
Adds the option to craft armor out of obsidian blocks. The armor is flameproof + has better stats than netherite. Great for any modded survival worlds. Not too OP so it is still very fun to play with, and easy to die (if you're trash like me).

CURRENT ISSUES Neoforge 1.20.4 version currently missing leggings and boots item textures - e.g. when armor is in inventory, hotbar, in a chest etc.
Forge & Fabric 1.20.1 versions currently missing all item textures - e.g. when armor is in inventory, hotbar, in a chest etc.
